recommendations.title: The Skin I Live In
recommendations.overview: A brilliant plastic surgeon creates a synthetic skin that withstands any kind of damage. His guinea pig: a mysterious and volatile woman who holds the key to his obsession.

recommendations.title: Last of the Dogmen
recommendations.overview: A Montana bounty hunter is sent into the wilderness to track three escaped prisoners. Instead he sees something that puzzles him. Later with a female Native Indian history professor, he returns to find some answers.

recommendations.title: The Nines
recommendations.overview: A troubled actor, a television show runner, and an acclaimed videogame designer find their lives intertwining in mysterious and unsettling ways.

recommendations.title: The Awakening
recommendations.overview: In post–War England, a writer and sometime-ghost hunter investigates a reported haunting at a boys boarding school.

recommendations.title: Hunter Hunter
recommendations.overview: A fur trapper leaves his wife and daughter behind to kill a rogue wolf in the remote wilderness, but they soon become increasingly worried when their peaceful existence is disrupted.

recommendations.title: Mystic River
recommendations.overview: The lives of three men who were childhood friends are shattered when one of them suffers a family tragedy.

recommendations.title: The Hidden Face
recommendations.overview: A Spanish orchestra conductor deals with the mysterious disappearance of his girlfriend.

recommendations.title: Mothers' Instinct
recommendations.overview: When a sudden tragedy uproots the lives of two women and their families, they begin to question the relationships they once held so dear.

recommendations.title: Stowaway
recommendations.overview: A three-person crew on a mission to Mars faces an impossible choice when an unplanned passenger jeopardizes the lives of everyone on board.

recommendations.title: The Vanishing
recommendations.overview: The boyfriend of an abducted woman never gives up the search as the abductor looks on.
